nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 大分水岭
nodes.summary: 大分水岭是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括White-throated nightjar、Powerful owl、绿宝石鹦鹉等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 东尖嘴吸蜜鸟
nodes.summary: 东尖嘴吸蜜鸟（Eastern spinebill，学名 Acanthorhynchus tenuirostris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。

links.key: bird-东尖嘴吸蜜鸟-6387675c__distributed_in__loc-约翰-莱瑟姆-鸟类学家-1edb5695
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The eastern spinebill (Acanthorhynchus tenuirostris) is a species of honeyeater found in south-eastern Australia in forest and woodland areas, as well as gardens in urban areas of Canberra, Sydney, Melbourne, Adelaide and Hobart

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The eastern spinebill (Acanthorhynchus tenuirostris) is a species of honeyeater found in south-eastern Australia in forest and woodland areas, as well as gardens in urban areas of Canberra, Sydney, Melbourne, Adelaide and Hobart

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Eastern spinebills are found in dry sclerophyll forest, scrub and heathland from the Cooktown area in North Queensland south through New South Wales east of the Great Dividing Range, through Victoria and into the Flinders Ranges in eastern South Australia as well as throughout Tasmania.Pizzey, Graham; Doyle, Roy (1980) A Field Guide to the Birds of Australia
